title: geranium absinthoides
intro: Geranium absinthoides, also known as the wormwood geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic, due to the presence of anthraquinone compounds. The health benefits of Geranium absinthoides include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and treat urinary tract infections, among other uses. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and teas.
